race.comment: IMPERVIOUS (1) has been plying her trade in much harder contests of late and will appreciate the sharp drop back in company here. Strips fitter third-up, draws the inside alley and gets 3kg off with the claim. Ticks plenty of boxes for a race like this. STEIN (9) resumes here but the form he showed when last in work was good enough for a race of this calibre. Tuned up for this with two recent trials and should be kept very safe. AMERICAN CONQUEST (2) was a six length winner at Toowoomba at the latest outing and will have derived a stack of confidence from that dominant victory. Looks ready for the step-up in trip now and can make his presence felt. MOSHULU SPIRIT (13) rounds out the selections.
